name: Chocolate Cinnamon Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow egg whites to come to room temperature, approximately one hour.
2. Sift flour, cocoa, powdered sugar, and cinnamon together three times; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg whites, cream of tartar, and vanilla with an electric mixer on medium speed until soft peaks form. Gradually add the sugar, 2 Tablespoons at a time, beating on high speed until stiff peaks form. If necessary, transfer to a larger bowl.
4. Sift about one-fourth of the flour mixture over the beaten egg whites. Gently fold in. Repeat folding with the remaining flour mixture in fourths.
5. Pour batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan. Bake on the lowest rack in the oven at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until the top springs back when touched.
6. Immediately invert the cake (keep it in the pan) and allow it to cool thoroughly. Loosen the sides of the cake from the pan and remove.
Makes 16 slices.
Nutritional info: Per serving: 117 calories, 3 gm protein, 27 gm carbohydrate, 0 gm fat, 0 mg cholesterol, 39 mg sodium, 41 mg potassium.
